privileged_info_summary: The task involves installing three real, publicly accessible Progressive Web Applications (PWAs) using Microsoft Edge: Photopea (https://www.photopea.com), Excalidraw (https://excalidraw.com), and DevDocs (https://devdocs.io). All three are legitimate, free web-based applications that support PWA installation in Microsoft Edge. The applications are installed as .desktop files in /home/ga/.local/share/applications, which is the standard XDG Base Directory location for user-installed applications on Linux. All metadata claims about target names, URL fragments, clean display names, and the desktop entry path are accurate and verified against authoritative sources.
